opportunity.title: I wrote a open source iMessage for your AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.reasoning: I have built multi-provider LLM routing and multi-agent orchestration systems, including secure agent-to-agent communication patterns, but I haven't specifically worked on implementing a distributed messaging protocol between AI agents at the protocol level.
